case_title: MOHFEI GEH VS. FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANY, INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEH, MOHFEI
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-24-2016 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GEH, MOHFEI AS TO DEFENDANT FIRE INSURANCE EXCHANGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-24-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-24-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-24-2016 BY JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. KAREN LU MARSHALL APPEARS ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT FIRE INSURANCE EXCHANGE, ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANY, AND WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: L. FONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-08-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FIRE INSURANCE EXCHANGE
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEH, MOHFEI AS TO DEFENDANT FIRE INSURANCE EXCHANGE

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GEH, MOHFEI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FIRE INSURANCE EXCHANGE AT THE PARTIES' REQUEST, THE NAME OF THE DEFENDANT IS CHANGED TO REFLECT ITS TRUE NAME: "FIRE INSURANCE EXCHANGE". STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
